title: haplopappus humilis
intro: Haplopappus humilis, also known as the low hop clover or low hop, is a perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to treat respiratory issues and skin irritations due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Haplopappus humilis include its use as a cough suppressant, its ability to reduce fever, and its potential to treat wounds and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Haplopappus humilis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for those seeking natural relief from various health issues.
